name: pyinstxtractor
title: pyinstxtractor
description:
PyInstalller Extractor
PyInstaller Extractor is a Python script to extract the contents of a
PyInstaller generated executable file.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use pyinstxtractor because PyInstalller Extractor.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use pyinstxtractor as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pyinstxtractor [options] [args]` as documented upstream for pyinstxtractor.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair pyinstxtractor with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `pyinstxtractor --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
